title: Region Mod
body:
RegionMod – A simple and reliable protection system for Fabric servers
RegionMod is a lightweight region protection mod designed for Fabric servers.
It allows you to create regions and subregions that protect areas from unauthorized building, breaking, or interacting.

Perfect for SMPs, community servers, or private worlds.

🔒 Features:

⦁ Create regions with /region create <name> <pos1> <pos2>

⦁ Remove regions with /region remove <name>

⦁ Create subregions with /subregion create <region> <name> <player> <pos1> <pos2>

⦁ Subregions are owned by a player (UUID‑based)

⦁ Automatic saving via PersistentState


Protection against:

⦁ block breaking

⦁ block placing

⦁ bucket usage

⦁ interacting with doors, chests, buttons, etc.

⦁ Admin bypass (permission level 4)


⚙️ How it works
RegionMod listens to all relevant player actions and checks whether the player is inside a protected region or subregion.
If the player is not the owner, the action is blocked.

Subregions override regions — ideal for plots inside larger areas.

🧩 Compatibility

Server‑Only: clients don’t need the mod


📦 Why RegionMod?
⦁ extremely lightweight

⦁ no dependencies

⦁ no mixins

⦁ very stable

⦁ perfect for small to medium servers
